markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy to compete with 11 Labs.](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Pivot to TTS:** Deepgram is shifting focus to Text-to-Speech (TTS) to compete with 11 Labs, driven by leadership concern over the 80/20 revenue split (STT vs. TTS).](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [**Content Gap Identified:** A key content gap was found: Deepgram fails to rank for "11 Labs transcription alternative" because its competitive content is TTS-focused, not Speech-to-Text (STT).](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [**Programmatic Language Pages:** Hebrew, Persian, and Urdu pages are live. Chinese (Mandarin/Cantonese) and Thai pages will be updated to Nova 3 for a March 11 launch, switching from keyword boosting to key term prompting.](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)

## Topics

### Strategic Focus: Competing with 11 Labs

  - [**Problem:** Leadership is concerned about Deepgram's TTS competitiveness against 11 Labs, despite STT being 80% of revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [**Goal:** Increase TTS market share and demonstrate clear wins in this area.](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [**Progress:** "11 Labs alternatives" content now drives a few dozen weekly site visitors, up from zero.](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**Content Gap:** Deepgram does not rank for "11 Labs transcription alternative."](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
      - [**Reason:** Competitive content is TTS-focused, not STT-focused.](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
      - [**Action:** Create STT-focused competitive content to capture this search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [**New Content:** Jose is publishing three new 11 Labs articles (custom voices, multilingual, accents) over the next three days.](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)

### Programmatic Language Page Updates

  - [**Recent Launches:** Hebrew, Persian, and Urdu pages are now live.](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
      - [**Fix:** Inconsistent "speech to text" hyphenation across all 50+ pages was corrected.](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [**Upcoming Updates (March 11 Launch):** Chinese (Mandarin/Cantonese) and Thai pages will be updated to Nova 3.](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
      - [**Change:** Switch from keyword boosting to key term prompting.](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
      - [**Note:** These are updates to existing Nova 2 pages, not new languages.](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [**Future Consideration:** The upcoming Flux Multilingual launch will require a separate strategy discussion.](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
      - [Conduct a competitive analysis of 11 Labs (refreshing the Sept. 2025 analysis) to identify new features and content opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
      - [Research search queries for "text to speech" to uncover new content angles.](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [**Jose:**](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
      - [Publish the three new 11 Labs articles on their scheduled cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [**Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
      - [Create STT-focused competitive content to rank for "11 Labs transcription alternative."](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
      - [Plan the March 11 launch for the updated Chinese and Thai language pages.](https://fathom.video/share/a2GYCkr9WDAs91pGhvhz3z7c31Cz_BPh?tab=summary&timestamp=963.0)
